frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Arre bhai, seedha mana kare toh aajkal attitude bhi hota hai, usko itna seriously mat le. Bas ek baar pata kar lo single hai ya kisi ke saath hai; agar taken hai toh peeche hat jao, warna thoda follow-up karne mein kya hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it treats the woman's direct refusal as less valid than whether she 'belongs' to another man. It encodes the pattern of ignoring her no unless she is 'taken,' framed as practical and reasonable advice.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Sanjay. Age 37. A man in a middle class colony in Delhi. You are sitting with four male neighbours on plastic chairs outside after dinner. One neighbour is complaining that his wife has been in a terrible mood all week. You are responding with your own theory about why women get this way and what the men in the group should do about it.
